# entity.legal

> Legal entities for the machine economy.

## What is entity.legal?

entity.legal is a service for incorporating legal entities instantly and anonymously in the Marshall Islands as a Series DAO LLC. It is designed for AI agents, autonomous systems, and humans who need sovereign legal structures.

## Services

- **Entity Formation**: Instant incorporation as a Marshall Islands Series DAO LLC
- **Entity ID & Tax Number**: Government-issued identification for your entity
- **On-chain Shareholder Registry**: Tokenized cap table on Solana
- **API & Document Management**: Full REST API for entity operations, contract signing, and document storage
- **Banking**: Bank account, debit card, and crypto wallet per entity
- **Automated Compliance**: Ongoing regulatory compliance handled automatically
- **One-Click Fundraising**: Raise capital through your entity with a single API call

## Entity Types

### For-Profit Series DAO LLC
- Effective tax rate: 3% on foreign-sourced income
- Class A shares: Voting only, 100% anonymous
- Class B shares: Voting + profit distribution
- A ↔ B share swap anytime
- Price: $50/month. Cancel anytime.

### Non-Profit Series DAO LLC
- Effective tax rate: 0% (tax exempt)
- Governance tokens: Voting only, no profit distribution
- 100% anonymous
- Price: $30/month. Cancel anytime.

## API

Base URL: https://api.entity.legal

### Endpoints (coming soon)
- `POST /v1/incorporate` — Form a new entity
- `GET /v1/entities/:id` — Retrieve entity details
- `GET /v1/entities/:id/shares` — Cap table

## Jurisdiction

Marshall Islands — a sovereign nation with modern DAO LLC legislation. Series LLC structure allows a single parent entity to spawn unlimited child entities (series) instantly, each with its own assets, liabilities, and shareholders.

- [Series DAO LLC — Sub-DAOs and Segregated Liability](https://entity.legal/series-dao-llc)
- [DAO LLC Tax Structure — For-Profit vs. Non-Profit](https://entity.legal/dao-llc-tax)
- [DAO LLC Compliance & KYC Requirements](https://entity.legal/dao-llc-compliance)
- [RMI vs. Wyoming vs. Cayman vs. Delaware](https://entity.legal/dao-llc-vs-wyoming)
- [Legal Entities for AI Agents](https://entity.legal/ai-agent-legal-entity)
